description: The ``Bake Reflection Probe`` node takes in a Reflection Probe and begins the baking process, then returns the Uri asset that can be used for the world when completed.

fields.* ([[Impulses|AysncCall]]): Calls an impulse to bake the reflection probe.
fields.OnBakeStart: Fires when the bake has started.
fields.OnBakeFail: Fires when the bake has failed.
fields.OnBakeComplete: Fires when the bake has completed.
